rows.notes: Page title clearly written at top centre: 'Soluta Varia'. Very legible and distinct from the rest of the text.
Left-hand heading under the title appears to read 'Account Sundry' (handwriting slightly slanted but readable). No monetary figures on this line.

rows.description: Pd Mr Bere & Mr Prior for a journey into Dorfrshire
rows.notes: Description partly faded but readable as a payment to 'Mr Bere & Mr Prior' for a journey; pounds/shillings/pence columns are aligned to the first numeric trio at top right read as 4 | 7 | 5. Handwriting ambiguity on place name spelling reduces confidence.

rows.description: Pd Mr Harland for Mr Beres Horse to Paull
rows.notes: Clear reading of 'Pd Mr Harland' and reference to a horse to 'Paull'. Numeric trio clearly reads 3 | 13 | 0 and passes currency range checks.

rows.description: Pd Mr Hatfield back for Mr Burton & man'd the ??? 1716
rows.notes: Description partially obscured/faint; the year '1716' is visible. The amount appears small and aligned to the next numeric line read as 0 | 8 | 0 but the text on this row is less distinct so confidence is moderate-low.

rows.description: Pd Mr Merwin Ridinge Burter for ye Expences of Visitation
rows.notes: Handwriting reads reasonably well as payment to 'Mr Merwin' (or 'Mervin') for 'Ridinge' or 'Ridings' and 'expenses of visitation'. Numeric columns align to 5 | 14 | 4; all values within valid ranges.
Short description 'of Platers Bill' (plate/plater ambiguous but clear that it's a bill). Amount columns clearly read 8 | 16 | 4.

rows.description: Pd for wire work for ye Larder
rows.notes: Description legible as 'wire work for ye Larder'. Amount aligned and reads 0 | 14 | 0. Column alignment unambiguous.
Clear entry text 'for a Buttery Book'. Numeric columns read 1 | 2 | 6; pence 6 is unambiguous.
Description 'Joyners Bill' (joiners) is clear; numeric trio reads 3 | 5 | 0 without ambiguity.
Description 'Cook for fowell' readable (fowell = fuel). Large amount 11 | 10 | 0 clearly aligned; handwriting for description slightly cursive but legible.
Description partially unclear; probably 'Cook for Xmas Gaudings' (celebrations). Amount reads 13 | 6 | 8; pence '8' is legible though the word 'Gaudings' is a guess from handwriting.

rows.description: Pd Gardiner for work done in ye Quadrangle
rows.notes: Clear reading 'Gardiner for work done in ye Quadrangle'. Numeric trio 0 | 7 | 0 is distinct and within valid ranges.
Surname looks like 'Gaigner' or 'Gaigner'. Amount 1 | 0 | 0 is clear; spelling of name uncertain hence reduced confidence.

rows.description: Pd ??? for candles for ye Chapel
rows.notes: First word unclear (looks like a name or 'Do' abbreviation) but 'for candles for ye Chapel' is readable. Large amount 17 | 17 | 6 aligned clearly; uncertainty only on the initial word.

rows.description: Pd for two Common Prayer Books for ye Chappel
rows.notes: Text clear: 'two Common Prayer books for ye Chappel'. Amount 1 | 3 | 0 is unambiguous.

rows.description: Pd for ye carriage of 4 boxes of books for ye Library from ye Count
rows.notes: Description mostly legible but last word (sender) uncertain ('Count' or 'Cousnt'). Amount 0 | 8 | 0 clear in the carriage-related line.

rows.description: Pd of Cook for fowell for Lady day
rows.notes: Reads 'Cook for fowell for Lady day'. Numeric 11 | 10 | 0 clear; 'Lady day' phrase visible albeit slightly cramped.
Another 'Buttery Book' entry; amounts 1 | 2 | 6 repeat earlier pattern and are clear. Description handwriting is legible.
Short entry 'for a Boll Rope' clearly readable. Amount 0 | 4 | 0 is distinct.

rows.description: Pd a Cook for fowell for midsumer
rows.notes: Reads as 'Cook for fowell for midsumer' (midsummer). Amount 11 | 10 | 0 is clear; 'midsumer' spelling uncertain from script.
Another payment to 'Mr Gaigner' (same ambiguous surname). Amount 1 | 0 | 0 matches the visible figure. Name clarity limited.
Second plater(s) bill entry visible. Amount reads 0 | 7 | 10; pence '10' is clearly written with two digits.

rows.description: Pd W Broadwater for Candles for ye Buttry, Hall, Cellar, Kitchen, gate
rows.notes: Name reads 'W Broadwater' and list of rooms is legible though cramped. Amount 15 | 12 | 0 is clearly aligned; long description increases chance of small transcription error.
Entry reads 'Glasiers Bill' (glaziers). Numeric trio 3 | 5 | 3 is distinct and within valid ranges.

rows.description: Pd Mr Harland for wine at Banffington Visitation
rows.notes: Name Mr Harland is legible; place 'Banffington' (or similar) is partially unclear. Amount 0 | 4 | 0 visible. Uncertainty derives from place name spelling.
Reads 'Brazier's Bill'; amount 5 | 19 | 0 is clear though 19 shillings is close to the upper valid bound (but still valid).
Another joiners bill entry; amount 7 | 15 | 0 is legible. Description clear.

rows.description: Pd Cook for fowell for mie
rows.notes: Text appears similar to prior fuel payments; final word reads like 'mie' or 'me' and is uncertain. Amount 11 | 10 | 0 clear.

rows.description: Pd Mr Clarke's bill for paper ink &c
rows.notes: Reads 'Mr Clarke's bill for paper ink &c'. Amount 0 | 15 | 4 legible but cramped; pence '4' clear.
Short final descriptive line before total is faint and the first word looks like 'For returning' and last word 'Mischonet' (very uncertain). Amount 0 | 1 | 0 is small but legible.
Final total at bottom right clearly underlined: '144 | 11 | 8'. Column alignment confirmed by multiple totals on page; digits are well-formed.
